flags.note: "chcel požiadať obyvateľov Pružiny, že ak na hradisku v minulosti našli zaujímavý predmet, nech sa mi ozvú na mail" uses an ungrammatical "že ak...nech" construction where standard Slovak requires "aby...ak" ("požiadať niekoho, aby..."). Fixing requires restructuring clause order beyond a local swap, so left unchanged pending human decision on preferred phrasing.

flags.location: blocks[9]-[30] (Martin Olšovský 1996 field report, quoted verbatim)
flags.note: Point-label markers like "(1)", "(2)"... and dash-bullet style ("- obvod", "-nárazové") are the report author's own idiosyncratic typing convention, inconsistently spaced. Left untouched as part of the protected verbatim quote per SS21.3 (no punctuation/orthography changes inside quoted primary sources).

"Cieľ: - Zameranie... - Zistenie..." appears to be a bulleted list collapsed into a single paragraph during extraction. Structural, not a text/grammar fix -- flagged for possible future re-structuring into a proper list, out of scope for this pass.
